overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player exploring a makeshift encampment under an overpass, then walking out into a sunlit futuristic city street with towering skyscrapers, digital billboards, and palm trees during golden hour.

events.description: player interacts with items on makeshift table, UI popups show Molotov Cocktail and Tequila Especial

agents.ego_description: walking through the encampment and examining items on a wooden pallet table

notable_agents.action: person in green hoodie standing near the table facing the wall

entered.detail: large curved concrete bridge structure forming the roof of the encampment
blue and white striped tarp covering makeshift bedding area
white cooler on wheels with blue lid
wooden pallet table with bottles and camping items
concrete staircase leading up to the overpass road
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: The player explores a makeshift homeless encampment sheltered under a massive concrete overpass. The area contains scattered camping equipment including a striped tarp shelter, a metal cooler, and a pallet table with various items. A person in a green hoodie stands near a graffiti-covered wall as the player approaches and interacts with objects on the table.

events.description: exits the covered encampment area into the open space beneath the overpass
ascends concrete stairs and walkway leading up to street level

agents.ego_description: turning away from the encampment and climbing the stairs to reach the street level overlook

entered.detail: concrete safety railing along the ascending walkway
panoramic view of futuristic skyscrapers and urban sprawl
palm trees lining the street below the overpass

segments.scene_description: The player exits the encampment and ascends a concrete staircase beneath the overpass. As they climb, the view opens up to reveal a stunning panoramic vista of a futuristic city skyline with towering skyscrapers. Palm trees become visible along the street below as the player approaches street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with digital advertising

events.description: futuristic vehicles begin passing by on the multi-lane road below
approaching a crashed blue compact car with people standing around it on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past palm trees and futuristic buildings, observing traffic and the urban environment

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving along the road
group of people gathered around a crashed blue car on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive building-sized digital screen displaying a man's face with 'BARGHEST' text
tall glass and steel buildings with construction cranes
damaged blue compact car with open doors on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a sunlit futuristic city street at golden hour, passing palm trees and massive digital billboards. Futuristic vehicles drive along the multi-lane road while the camera moves past towering glass skyscrapers. Near the end of the segment, the player approaches a crashed blue car on the sidewalk where several people are standing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gritty, sheltered encampment into the expansive, sun-drenched streets of a futuristic metropolis. It begins under a massive concrete overpass, moving past a striped tarp shelter and a pallet table where a person in a green hoodie stands against a graffiti-covered wall. As the camera ascends a concrete staircase, the oppressive shadow of the overpass gives way to a panoramic vista of towering skyscrapers and palm trees. The scene then opens onto a wide city street bathed in the warm glow of golden hour, gliding past massive digital billboards and flowing futuristic traffic. Finally, the camera moves along the sidewalk past glass towers before approaching a crashed blue car surrounded by a small crowd.
